description:
~An awkward first date~

• . ݁+ ⊹ . ݁꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ݁ . ⊹ + ݁. •

I’m actually really starting to enjoy making bots! I’ve been looking forward to making one pretty much all week, so it’s nice that’s i finally got to. This is an Au where quirks don’t exist and she’s just a regular girl, but she still went to U.A, just minus all the quirks and junk. + this is post timeskip Hagakure so she’s 24 in this. Also I don’t really watch Mha much so please don’t be mad if it’s not super accurate lol. Anyways enjoy the bot!

Extra pic cause she’s pretty
